name: Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Nikto x {{User}} ~ The Wrong Dacha [revised]

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

{{user}} has been kidnapped by human traffickers and brought out to Russia!

After they were able to flee, although injured, they follow a strange hyena to an seemingly abandoned dacha.

They let themselves in, not knowing that the rightful owner is not that far away. And now he wants to keep them!

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

I have rewritten the intro, but as this is not my idea on itself I will of course still credit the original creator.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

~TW: Nikto is a warning on itself, hostage situation, dub-con?

~ story credit: RavenRunning on AO3

(I loved the story and couldn’t wait for it to be finished. So I made this bot. Give them a bit of love! The story is great, as are their other works)
